title: 日产首席执行官谈自动驾驶、在美国制造汽车
summary: Nissan Motor Co. President and CEO Ivan Espinosa talks about the future of autonomous driving, investing in the US and how tariffs are making it harder to sell Mexican-made cars in the US. Those cars are being tariffed at a 25% rate. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)（原题：Nissan CEO on Autonomous Driving, Making Cars in US）
